note: compatibility_pct is a percentile rank of overlap-coefficient (shared video_ids / smaller user's total videos) among the 15 most active users in youtube_watch_log.csv. shared_interests and blind_spot fields are placeholders - real labels need video title/topic resolution via YouTube API, not done for this demo.

shared_interests: placeholder - resolve top shared video_ids into topics
blind_spot_a: placeholder - videos user_b watches that user_a never does
blind_spot_b: placeholder - videos user_a watches that user_b never does
